title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial showing how to install and use Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. The guide covers setting up Ollama, selecting LLMs like Qwen 3.5, and building a travel agency application with multiple AI agents and a Flask-based UI.
